column1: # /Worksheet Insert Sheet After  +  Ctrl-PgUp/PgDn sheet navigation.
# 1-2-3 R3.x has 256 sheets per active file (letters A..IV). /WIS prompts
# Before|After; After adds a blank sheet following the current one and
# leaves the pointer on the original.  Ctrl-PgDn / Ctrl-PgUp cycle
# Seed A:A1 so we can verify the original survives the insert.
# Pick After: pointer stays on A:A1; data intact.
# Ctrl-PgDn moves to the new sheet B.
# Ctrl-PgUp back to sheet A; original data still there.
# Ctrl-PgDn once more — still goes to B (no wrap).
# Ctrl-PgDn at last sheet is a no-op.
